name: inbox
description: Quick capture inbox — write first, route later. Capture thoughts, extract #hashtags, match contact names, and route to the right module when ready.
standalone_features: Route items to any module when ready
Unrouted items surface in /nudges after 24 hours

features: Auto-detect contact names in captured content
Route inbox items directly to contact records
enhancements.description: Inbox captures automatically detect and link to contacts mentioned in your text.
